title: Replace new Buffer(...) calls
author: OSjoerdWie
body:
When used in node, the following 

`const exceljs = require("exceljs")` 

results in a deprecation warning:

`[DEP0005] DeprecationWarning: Buffer() is deprecated due to security and usability issues. Please use the Buffer.alloc(), Buffer.allocUnsafe(), or Buffer.from() methods instead.`

Please update the module accordingly.

comments.author: vobarian
EHadoux
comments.body: Looks like it will be fixed at some point (see [https://github.com/ZJONSSON/node-unzipper/issues/164](https://github.com/ZJONSSON/node-unzipper/issues/164)).
